subject: Finance Weekly Standup Notes
content:
All,

Following up from the All-Hands earlier today. Here are the action items:

- @Leo: Finalize the spec by Wednesday (target: 8/14)
- @Paul: Schedule the Security Hardening review with Legal
- @Leo: Update the Search Index configuration per our discussion
- @Quinn: Send out the revised Project Falcon timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Wednesday at 8:30. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,
Quinn
--
Quinn Hernandez
Cyberdyne | Sales Department
Phone: +1-463-704-2046 | Email: quinn.hernandez@cyberdyne.systems

subject: Re: Finance Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Hi Quinn,

Just a heads up — the Notification Hub deployment (v6.12.99) is scheduled for Tuesday at 15:00 GMT. Expected downtime is approximately 30 minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #4019: Remove caching layer
- PR #4031: Neptune feature flag rollout
- Config update for EMEA region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work. We'll send a notification to #engineering once complete.

Thanks,
Leo
